daily_summary.headline: Exciting Rocket Launches and Aurora Insights for April 3, 2026

top_events.title: Soyuz-5 Demo Flight
top_events.description: Demonstration Flight for Russia's new Soyuz-5 launch vehicle.
top_events.action: Watch the live stream for this significant test flight.

top_events.title: Atlas V 551 | Amazon Leo (LA-05)
top_events.description: Launch of Amazon's satellite constellation for global broadband internet.
top_events.action: Tune in to see the deployment of Amazon's broadband satellites.

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | Starlink Group 17-35
top_events.description: Deployment of 25 Starlink satellites for SpaceX's internet constellation.
top_events.action: Catch the live stream of SpaceX's latest Starlink mission.

alerts.title: Soyuz-5 Demo Flight
alerts.message: The Soyuz-5 Demo Flight is a significant test of Russia's new launch vehicle. Scheduled for April 4, 2026, at 11:00 UTC.
alerts.action_required: Watch the live stream for this significant test flight.
